events.content: goal: ship a generic local chat ui

constraint: keep api stable
constraint: self-hosted first
We decide to focus on memory continuity for long-running projects
Status update: early demos looked too much like a chat shell
goal: ship a self-hosted memory layer for project assistants
We decide to focus on low-drift memory reliability before expanding integrations
Constraint reminder: do not become a general-purpose agent platform
Noise: note about optional future desktop demos
goal: ship a self-hosted long-term memory runtime for local models
We decide to treat assistant runtime as a product boundary, not just loose APIs
Status update: roadmap now centers retention, stability, grounding, and replayability
Reminder: hosted platform work is explicitly out of scope
Noise: casual discussion about optional desktop mockups and branding experiments
